note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

v_1.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

v_2.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

undefined_2.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

briefly_describe_your_claim_including_re.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

plus_costs_if_you_are_asking_for_an_orde.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

an_agreement_state_that_request_here_1.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

the_plaintiff_affirms_that_this_is_not_a.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

printed_name.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

is_the_person_signing_this_statement_of_.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

yes.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

maine_judicial_branch.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

attorney_for_plaintiff.guidance: An attorney's Maine bar registration number.
